name.marathi: इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्रीय अपंगत्व पेन्शन योजना
name.english: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme

scheme.launched_by: Ministry of Rural Development, Government of India
scheme.helpline: Varies by state (applications handled at local offices)

budget_provision.central_assistance: ₹300 per month (18–79 years), ₹500 per month (80+ years)
budget_provision.state_additional_support: Varies by state (e.g., Maharashtra adds ₹1200 under Sanjay Gandhi Niradhar Anudan Yojana)
budget_provision.funding_source: Shared between Central Government and State Governments under NSAP framework

scheme.active_beneficiaries_as_of_2026: Over 25 lakh persons with disabilities supported (approx.)

objective.primary: To provide financial assistance and social security to persons with severe disabilities from Below Poverty Line (BPL) families
secondary: Ensure minimum income support for disabled individuals
Promote dignity, independence, and social inclusion
Reduce poverty and vulnerability in disabled households
Provide targeted support to marginalized groups such as dwarfs and persons with multiple disabilities

pension_assistance.note: States may provide additional top-up pension support

additional_benefits: State governments may provide top-up pension (e.g., Maharashtra adds ₹1200)
Eligibility for other NSAP-linked schemes such as widow pension and old-age pension
Access to UMANG app for digital application and tracking
Integration with Aadhaar for transparency and reduced leakages
Awareness programs to ensure inclusion of marginalized disabled persons

residency.details: Applicant must be a resident of India

disability_proof.details: Disability certificate showing 80% or more disability (physical/mental); dwarfs also eligible

economic_status.details: Must belong to Below Poverty Line (BPL) household

bank_account.details: Active savings bank account with Aadhaar linkage for DBT

required_documents: Disability certificate issued by competent medical authority
BPL proof (ration card or income certificate)

steps: Collect application form from local office
Fill details and attach required documents

issues: Low pension amount compared to cost of living
Awareness gaps among rural disabled persons
Exclusion errors due to documentation barriers
government_initiatives: Direct Benefit Transfer system for transparency
Awareness campaigns in rural and urban areas
State-level top-ups to increase pension amount
